budget_breakdown.teacher_cache_policy: eager once before arm loop; prefer g167 cache hit, otherwise write one g173 cache and reuse across all KD arms

notes: Teacher cache train signature intentionally matches genome_167 so cached top-k logits can be reused.
Shared Qwen tokenizer means embedding / lm_head parameters dominate total student params; this is expected.
Matched-capability compute divides standalone total FLOPs by retention_vs_qwen_kd.
Late-KD arms use the same batch schedule and activate KD only on steps 2401-3600.
Standalone late-KD compute includes schedule-effective teacher-cache FLOPs; full-cache reuse is also logged.
Envelope fix keeps all 6 arms and all 3 seeds; only the per-cell step horizon is reduced.

summary.verdict: FAIL: revised cross-architecture KD cash-out misses a locked floor. Failed conditions: cross_arch_transfer_ratio_lt_1p5. Retention=101.1%, transfer ratio=0.99x, late/full=97.7%.

cross_arch_cashout.note: Matched-capability compute is defined as arm_total_compute / retention_vs_qwen_kd. For full-KD arms, arm_total_compute uses the same schedule-effective accounting as the original cycle-42 cash-out.

late_kd_vs_full_kd.hypothesis: C20 upgrades from a same-family timing result to a general efficiency mechanism if the Llama late-KD arm reaches at least 85% of full-KD C3 at 33% KD compute.

verdict: FAIL: revised cross-architecture KD cash-out misses a locked floor. Failed conditions: cross_arch_transfer_ratio_lt_1p5. Retention=101.1%, transfer ratio=0.99x, late/full=97.7%.
